metadata.description: Clear, honest blog prose — a plain first-person voice, no-hype rules that strip rhetorical and marketing constructions, no-self-sabotage rules against the imposter voice, and a checkable-claims rule that keeps every factual claim verifiable in under a minute

plugins.name: blog-prose
plugins.description: Voice, no-hype, no-self-sabotage, and checkable-claims rules for blog posts and public web prose, with a mandatory pre-publish self-check
